slots.caption_ig:
Your dish passport. Track everything you've tried. See what to eat next. Build a private log of every dish that mattered to you, scored on your taste, not the crowd's.

#ForkFox #FoodLog #FoodTracker #DishNotRestaurant #FoodSmart
slots.caption_fb: Every dish you've tried, scored on your own taste, kept in a private passport only you see. The app learns what you actually like — bread quality, meat texture, ambiance — and ranks future dishes against your history, not the crowd's average.
slots.video_gen_prompt: Vertical 9:16 video, 8 seconds. A passport-style book opens. Pages flip to show dish stamps — cheesesteak, ramen, taco, dosa. Stats panel: '24 dishes, 9 favorites, 3 Michelin spots'. End frame: 'Your dish passport.' with 'passport' in red.
